sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lungdam huai leitung melpha, lungdam huai vantung etlawm;
Suah tung a kipan itna, kote kiim ah
Hih teng hang Khazih Topa, kongsak uh lungdamna la.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mual le guam, singkung, paakpha, ni, kha, a tang aksite,
hang Khazih Topa, kongsak uh lungdamna la.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sanggam, suahpih, nu le pa, ki-it diamdiam a
Lei le van a lawm apha, migitna ngaihsutna pha
Hih teng hang Khazih Topa, kongsak uh

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Nangma pawlpi’n a tawntung, khut siangthote lamto-in;
khempeuh ah biakpiakna, lui in Nangmah hong bia hi
Hih teng hang Khazih Topa, kongsak uh lungdamna la.
